payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book for July 2023 covering integrated projects, capital program status, safety report, and procurements.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Construction & Development division of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority

tool_args.label: New York State Department of Transportation

payload.entity_name: New York State Department of Transportation (NYSDOT)

payload.description: Independent Engineering Consultant for the MTA Capital Program Committee
Design-Build Joint Venture contractor with RailWorks for Penn Station Access
Design-Build Joint Venture contractor with Halmar International for Penn Station Access
Now known as Grand Central Madison (GCM). Provides LIRR passengers with direct service to Grand Central Terminal.

Will provide Metro-North New Haven Line customers with service into and out of Penn Station via Amtrak's Hell Gate Line. Includes four new ADA-accessible stations in the East Bronx, 19 miles of new and rehabilitated track work, bridge rehabilitations, signal/communications upgrades, and expansion of New Rochelle Yard.
Provides LIRR passengers with direct service to Grand Central Terminal. 11.5-mile underground tunnel with new station and concourse below existing GCT. Revenue service started January 25, 2023.

Part of Northeast Corridor Congestion Relief Project to reconstruct Harold Interlocking, creating two grade-separated routes (Eastbound Reroute and Westbound Bypass) for Amtrak and Metro-North trains between Penn Station and Hell Gate/New Haven Lines.
Capital Program Committee Meeting held at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY
LIRR Concourse achieved substantial completion

tool_args.label: LIRR Mainline Expansion (Third Track) Substantial Completion

payload.description: LIRR Mainline Expansion (Third Track) achieved substantial completion
Grand Central Madison (East Side Access) started revenue service

Metro-North Penn Station Access contractual substantial completion
Metro-North Penn Station Access forecast substantial completion (MTA C&D, DB Update #10, and IEC forecast)
MTA planned to commit $10 billion worth of capital projects in 2023
Through June, MTA has committed $1.964 billion versus a $3.894 billion YTD goal
MTA expects to make 95% of its $10 billion commitment goal by year end

payload.claim_text: The project has experienced significant construction delays (approximately 6-9 months) due to limited availability of Amtrak Force Account support

payload.claim_text: Leggett Interlocking is one of the key project elements and was identified as an early construction item during preliminary design. Commissioning of this interlocking is scheduled for mid-2024.
